flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Northeast Iowa Community College fell 27% between 2006 and 2009 (43.5% → 31.8%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Northeast Iowa Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.8k → $7.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Northeast Iowa Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.1k → $6.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northeast Iowa Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).
